data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了在Astro博客中添加LaTeX公式的方法，包括安装必要的插件、配置Astro、导入KaTeX CSS和设置文本颜色，以实现数学公式的完美渲染。
data.ogDescription: 掌握在Astro博客文章中嵌入LaTeX公式的技巧，提升科学文档的专业度。

data.metaDescription: Learn two integration methods for astro-minimax: GitHub Template for beginners with full customization and NPM Packages for continuous updates. Discover how to set up, configure, and deploy your blog with detailed steps.
data.ogDescription: Master astro-minimax integration with two methods: GitHub Template for customization and NPM Packages for updates. Get your blog up and running with our step-by-step guide.

data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了如何利用Git钩子自动填充博客主题frontmatter中的创建日期和修改日期，通过pre-commit钩子实现自动化更新，提高内容管理效率。
data.ogDescription: 掌握如何使用Git钩子自动更新博客文章的创建和修改日期，提高内容管理效率，让自动化流程更简单。

data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了为astro-minimax博客主题设计的预定义配色方案，包括浅色和深色配色方案，通过CSS选择器实现，适用于不同主题和背景，提升网站视觉效果。
data.ogDescription: 探索astro-minimax博客主题的预定义配色方案，轻松替换原有配色，提升网站视觉效果，适用于不同主题和背景。

data.metaDescription: Learn how to enable/disable light and dark mode and customize color schemes for your website using astro-minimax theme. Understand configuration settings and CSS customization techniques.
data.ogDescription: Discover how to toggle between light and dark modes and personalize your website's color schemes with astro-minimax theme. Get step-by-step guidance on configuration and CSS.

data.metaDescription: Explore customizable predefined color schemes for the astro-minimax blog theme, including light and dark variations such as Lobster, Leaf Blue, and Astro Deep Purple, with detailed CSS configurations.
data.ogDescription: Discover a variety of predefined color schemes for astro-minimax blog theme, perfect for customizing your blog's appearance with easy-to-implement CSS.

data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了如何为astro-minimax主题启用或禁用明暗模式，并详细说明了如何自定义网站的配色方案，包括亮色和暗色模式的颜色属性设置。
data.ogDescription: 掌握astro-minimax主题的明暗模式切换和配色方案自定义技巧，让你的网站色彩更加个性化。

data.metaDescription: Learn how to create new blog posts in the astro-minimax theme, including organizing posts in subdirectories, managing frontmatter properties, and optimizing for SEO with unique slugs and tags.
data.ogDescription: Discover the step-by-step guide to adding new posts in astro-minimax theme, from organizing content to optimizing for search engines.

data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了在astro-minimax主题中创建新博客文章的步骤和技巧，包括文章结构、frontmatter配置、目录添加和图片存储方法，帮助用户高效管理博客内容。
data.ogDescription: 掌握在astro-minimax主题中添加新文章的详细步骤，提升博客内容管理效率，增强SEO表现。

data.metaDescription: Learn how to integrate LaTeX equations into Astro blog posts for enhanced mathematical and scientific documentation. Follow the step-by-step guide to install plugins, update configurations, and render equations correctly.
data.ogDescription: Discover a comprehensive guide to adding LaTeX equations to your Astro blog posts, perfect for scientific and mathematical content. Enhance your posts with clear, rendered equations.

data.metaDescription: Learn how to customize the astro-minimax Astro blog theme with detailed configuration options in the config file, including website settings, SEO optimizations, and user interface features.
data.ogDescription: Discover the step-by-step guide to configuring astro-minimax, a highly customizable Astro blog theme, with options for SEO, UI, and more.

data.metaDescription: astro-minimax v1.4.0 新增动态OG图片生成功能，为博客文章自动创建个性化社交图片，提升社交媒体互动效果。
data.ogDescription: astro-minimax v1.4.0 版本更新，现在可以为每篇博客文章自动生成个性化的OG图片，提升社交媒体分享效果。

data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了如何配置astro-minimax主题，包括设置网站信息、布局宽度和自定义logo或标题，以实现个性化的Astro博客。
data.ogDescription: 掌握astro-minimax主题配置，打造个性化Astro博客，提升SEO效果。

data.metaDescription: Learn how to efficiently update dependencies in your JavaScript or Node.js projects, with a focus on astro-minimax. Discover methods for updating package dependencies, including using npm-check-updates, and tips for updating the astro-minimax template without breaking your project.
data.ogDescription: Efficiently manage project dependencies with this guide on updating astro-minimax and other JS/Node projects. Get step-by-step methods for updating packages and templates.

data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了如何更新astro-minimax项目的依赖，包括手动更新和使用npm-check-updates工具，以及如何更新astro-minimax模板而不破坏自定义内容。
data.ogDescription: 掌握如何高效更新astro-minimax项目的依赖和模板，确保你的项目保持最新，避免潜在的兼容性问题。

data.metaDescription: Learn how to automate the input of created and modified dates in the astro-minimax blog theme frontmatter using pre-commit Git hooks, enhancing workflow efficiency and consistency.
data.ogDescription: Discover how to use Git hooks to automate date entries in your blog posts, making your workflow more efficient and your content management more consistent.

data.metaDescription: Learn how astro-minimax v1.4.0 introduces dynamic OG image generation for blog posts, enhancing social media engagement without manual image specification for each post.
data.ogDescription: Discover the new feature in astro-minimax v1.4.0 that automates OG image creation for blog posts, saving time and improving social media presence.

data.metaDescription: 本文介绍了astro-minimax的两种使用方式：GitHub Template和NPM包集成，分别适合不同场景和需求，提供详细的步骤和配置方法，帮助用户快速搭建和维护个人博客。
data.ogDescription: 快速掌握astro-minimax的两种使用方式，轻松搭建和维护你的个人博客，无论是新手还是希望内容与系统分离的高级用户，都能在这里找到适合的解决方案。
